title: Toy Stunt Bike: Tiptop's Trials
short_description: Guide chimp rider Tiptop across thirty-six household stunt tracks on Switch and PS4 — 60fps trials with online leaderboards.
description: Toy Stunt Bike is a 3D, action-packed, micro-sized motorbike trials game. Guide Tiptop the chimpanzee across thirty-six tracks set in a variety of household locations. Leap over toasters, make massive jumps onto garden chairs, use laptops as ramps and perform crazy stunts. Silky smooth 60fps gameplay in every mode. Thirty-six tracks to race + secrets. Compete worldwide with online leaderboards. Spectacular bike stunts and crashes. Ideal for handheld, short burst play. Stunning soundtrack by Waterflame.
